creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:

  FreeBSD ports repository

  - Better description on pkg-descr.
  - Fix pkg-plist.
  - Fix NOPORTDOCS case.
  - Move ${PKGMESSAGE} to ${FILESDIR}.
  - Bump PORTREVISION.
  
  PR:             ports/125452
  Submitted by:   "Vasiliy P. Melnik" <basil@vpm.net.ua>

  Approved by:    gabor (mentor, implicit)
